title: Hash Functions
description: Hash functions deterministically compress arbitrary inputs into fixed-size digests. Bitcoin relies on preimage, second-preimage, and collision resistance for identifiers, commitments, and proof-of-work.

resources.title: Mastering Bitcoin
resources.notes: Introduces hashes alongside Bitcoin keys, addresses, and transaction identifiers.

resources.title: Bitcoin Developer Guide: Block Chain
resources.notes: Shows where hashing appears in block headers, merkle roots, and proof-of-work.

resources.title: Bitcoin Core Academy: Script
resources.notes: Connects hashing to practical Bitcoin validation and script-era design choices.
